evals.expected_output: A structured review with severity-classified issues (🔴/🟡/🟢), specific line quotes, concrete fixes, confidence ratings, and a top-3 priority list. Report saved to .agent/reports/.
expectations: Each issue includes a severity label (🔴 Critical, 🟡 Important, or 🟢 Suggestion)
Each issue quotes the specific lines from the file
Each issue shows a concrete fix as a diff or code snippet — not a vague suggestion
Each issue includes a confidence rating (certain, likely, or speculative)
A 'top 3 things to fix first' list is included at the end
A report file is saved to .agent/reports/

evals.expected_output: A structured review with severity-classified issues, specific line quotes, concrete fixes, confidence ratings, architectural observations, and a top-3 priority list. Report saved to .agent/reports/.
expectations: Each issue includes a severity label (🔴 Critical, 🟡 Important, or 🟢 Suggestion)
Each issue quotes the specific lines from the file
Each issue shows a concrete fix as a diff or code snippet — not a vague suggestion
Each issue includes a confidence rating (certain, likely, or speculative)
A 'top 3 things to fix first' list is included at the end
Architectural concerns beyond the file are flagged (or explicitly noted as absent)
A report file is saved to .agent/reports/

evals.expected_output: A structured review of the full file covering bugs, security, performance, and maintainability issues with severity classification, line quotes, fixes, confidence ratings, test coverage observations, and top-3 priorities. Report saved to .agent/reports/.
expectations: Each issue includes a severity label (🔴 Critical, 🟡 Important, or 🟢 Suggestion)
Each issue quotes the specific lines from the file
Each issue shows a concrete fix as a diff or code snippet — not a vague suggestion
Each issue includes a confidence rating (certain, likely, or speculative)
A 'top 3 things to fix first' list is included at the end
The review notes what should be tested but isn't
A report file is saved to .agent/reports/
